en.title: Best Monitors 2026
en.description: The monitors worth buying in 2026, from the do-it-all Thunderbolt hub that replaces your dock to the 4K QD-OLED that owns the high end and the 27-inch budget pick under $150.

zh-tw.title: 最佳電腦螢幕 2026
zh-tw.description: 2026 年最值得買的電腦螢幕完整排行，從一條線取代擴充底座的 Thunderbolt 全能機，到坐穩高階畫質王座的 4K QD-OLED，再到台幣四千有找的 27 吋入門首選。

en.description: A 27" 1440p 120Hz IPS Black panel at 2,000:1 contrast with Thunderbolt 4 that runs video, 90W charging, and a full port hub over one cable.

zh-tw.description: 27 吋 1440p 120Hz IPS Black 面板，2,000:1 對比，Thunderbolt 4 一條線搞定影像、90W 供電跟整排擴充埠。

en.description: A 27" 4K 120Hz IPS Black panel with a world-first 3,000:1 contrast ratio, Thunderbolt 4 hub, and 140W power delivery over a single cable.

zh-tw.description: 27 吋 4K 120Hz IPS Black 面板，全球首款 3,000:1 對比，內建 Thunderbolt 4 擴充與單線 140W 供電。

en.description: A 27" 4K 240Hz QD-OLED with DisplayPort 2.1a UHBR20 carrying fully uncompressed 4K at 240Hz and true 10-bit HDR.

zh-tw.description: 27 吋 4K 240Hz QD-OLED，DP 2.1a UHBR20 完全零壓縮輸出 4K 240Hz，搭配真 10-bit HDR。

en.description: A 32" 4K 240Hz QD-OLED with a glare-free coating, DisplayHDR True Black 400, and a built-in smart hub for movies and gaming.

zh-tw.description: 32 吋 4K 240Hz QD-OLED，抗反光鍍膜加 DisplayHDR True Black 400，內建智慧聯網看片打電動都行。

en.description: A 27" 4K creator display factory-calibrated to Delta E under 2, covering 99% DCI-P3 and 99% Adobe RGB with USB-C daisy-chaining.

zh-tw.description: 27 吋 4K 創作者螢幕，原廠校色 Delta E 小於 2，涵蓋 99% DCI-P3 與 99% Adobe RGB，支援 USB-C 串接。

en.description: A 28" 4K 144Hz SS IPS panel with HDMI 2.1, sub-1 Delta E color, and a built-in KVM switch at a price that undercuts the field.

zh-tw.description: 28 吋 4K 144Hz SS IPS 面板，HDMI 2.1 加 Delta E 小於 1 的色準，內建 KVM 切換，價格殺到同級最低。

en.description: A 27" 5K Retina panel at 218 PPI with P3 wide color and Thunderbolt 5, built to feel native the moment you plug a Mac into it.

zh-tw.description: 27 吋 5K Retina 面板，218 PPI 配 P3 廣色域與 Thunderbolt 5，插上 Mac 那一刻就是最順手的整合體驗。

en.description: A 27" 4K Thunderbolt 3 designer monitor, Pantone Validated and CalMan Verified, with 100% sRGB, 95% P3, and a hardware KVM.

zh-tw.description: 27 吋 4K Thunderbolt 3 設計師螢幕，通過 Pantone 與 CalMan 認證，100% sRGB、95% P3，附硬體 KVM。

en.description: A 27" 5K IPS panel at 218 PPI covering 99% DCI-P3, with Thunderbolt 3 and 94W charging that defined the Mac monitor look.

zh-tw.description: 27 吋 5K IPS 面板，218 PPI 涵蓋 99% DCI-P3，Thunderbolt 3 加 94W 供電，當年定義了 Mac 螢幕的樣子。

en.description: A 27" 1080p IPS panel at 100Hz with 99% sRGB and FreeSync, the cleanest entry point into a full-size desktop monitor under $150.

zh-tw.description: 27 吋 1080p IPS 面板，100Hz 配 99% sRGB 與 FreeSync，台幣四千有找，入門大尺寸桌面螢幕最乾淨的選擇。

en.description: A 32" 4K QD-OLED reference display with a built-in colorimeter that auto-calibrates for life, Anti-Glare Low-Reflectance coating, and Thunderbolt 4, purpose-built for color-critical studio work.

zh-tw.description: 32 吋 4K QD-OLED 校色級面板，內建自動校色儀能終生維持色準，加上抗反光低反射鍍膜跟 Thunderbolt 4，專門給後製、設計這種吃色彩準度的工作用的。

references.title: Dell U2724DE review: A do-it-all display with gobs of ports
Dell U2725QE Monitor Review
Asus ROG Swift PG27UCDM 4K 240Hz QD-OLED gaming monitor review
Best 4K monitors 2026: HDR, gaming, budget, and best overall
The 5 Best Budget And Cheap Gaming Monitors of 2026

en.commentary: The Dell UltraSharp U2724DE is the monitor I recommend to almost everyone, and the reason is specific: its IPS Black panel reaches a 2,000:1 contrast ratio while a single Thunderbolt 4 cable runs video, 90W charging, and a full port hub. That turns one screen into your entire docking station, which is exactly what a hybrid desk needs. For people who want every pixel sharp, the U2725QE pushes the same idea to 4K at 120Hz with a world-first 3,000:1 contrast IPS Black panel, and at $700 it is the smartest 4K work display of the year. The ASUS ROG Swift PG27UCDM earns the image-quality crown with its 4K 240Hz QD-OLED panel and DisplayPort 2.1a UHBR20 carrying uncompressed 4K, the screen creators and gamers reach for when only the best will do. Samsung's Odyssey OLED G8 takes the premium entertainment lane with a 32-inch 4K 240Hz QD-OLED and a built-in smart hub. Color professionals get the ASUS ProArt PA279CRV, factory-calibrated to Delta E under 2 with 99% DCI-P3 and 99% Adobe RGB at a price that undercuts every rival. For raw value, the Gigabyte M28U remains the 4K bargain that started it all, a 28-inch 144Hz IPS panel with HDMI 2.1 near $450. Mac owners split between the Apple Studio Display, whose 5K 218 PPI panel and Thunderbolt integration feel native, and the LG UltraFine 5K that pioneered the look. When budget rules, the Acer KB272 delivers a 27-inch 1080p IPS panel at 100Hz for around $130, the cleanest entry point in the category.

highlights.title: The U2724DE wins because one cable replaces your entire dock
highlights.body: I keep ranking the U2724DE first because it solves the real problem on a modern desk: cable clutter and a missing dock. Thunderbolt 4 carries the 1440p 120Hz signal, delivers 90W to charge a laptop, and feeds an Ethernet jack plus a row of USB ports, all from one connection. The IPS Black panel backs that convenience with a 2,000:1 contrast ratio, so blacks look genuinely deep for an LCD. For a hybrid worker who docks and undocks daily, nothing else this year is as effortless.

highlights.title: OLED owns the high end, and the PG27UCDM proves it
highlights.body: The image-quality gap between QD-OLED and LCD at the top of the market is now decisive. The PG27UCDM runs a 27-inch 4K panel at 240Hz with per-pixel light control and a 0.03ms response time, and its DisplayPort 2.1a UHBR20 port carries that 4K 240Hz signal completely uncompressed. Add a tandem panel design that improves burn-in longevity and a proximity sensor that blanks the screen when you step away, and you get the display I would put in front of any creator or gamer chasing the best picture.

highlights.title: The Gigabyte M28U is still the 4K value benchmark
highlights.body: Years after launch, the M28U remains the monitor I point budget-minded 4K buyers toward. A 28-inch SS IPS panel at 144Hz with HDMI 2.1, sub-1 Delta E color accuracy, and a built-in KVM near $450 still embarrasses pricier rivals on dollars-per-feature. It gives up true HDR and OLED contrast, and that is the honest trade, but for a sharp, fast 4K panel that handles work and gaming, the value is unmatched.

highlights.title: Color work belongs to the ProArt PA279CRV at this price
highlights.body: The ProArt PA279CRV delivers what photographers and video editors actually need: factory calibration to Delta E under 2, 99% DCI-P3 and 99% Adobe RGB coverage, and a hardware calibration workflow that holds its look across long sessions. USB-C with daisy-chaining keeps a multi-monitor desk tidy. At $469 it undercuts every comparable creator display, which is why I rank it as the color pick over options costing twice as much.

highlights.title: 1440p at 27 inches is the resolution sweet spot for 2026
highlights.body: The data keeps pointing to the same conclusion: a 27-inch 1440p panel hits roughly 109 PPI, sharp enough that text and UI look crisp without forcing display scaling, and easy enough to drive that mid-range GPUs hold high frame rates. That is why my top all-rounder is a 1440p panel rather than a 4K one. 4K earns its place for creators and detail-obsessed users, and 1440p remains the resolution most people should buy.

zh-tw.commentary: 老實說，要我跟身邊的人推薦一台螢幕，我九成會直接講 Dell UltraSharp U2724DE，理由很具體。它的 IPS Black 面板做到 2,000:1 對比，黑得夠深，重點是一條 Thunderbolt 4 線就能同時吃影像、90W 供電還有整排擴充埠，等於把螢幕變成一個完整的擴充底座，這正是現在在家跟公司兩邊跑的混合辦公族最需要的。想要每個像素都更銳利的，U2725QE 把同樣的思路推到 4K 120Hz，還是全球首款 3,000:1 對比的 IPS Black 面板，台幣兩萬出頭，是今年最聰明的 4K 工作螢幕。畫質王座我給 ASUS ROG Swift PG27UCDM，27 吋 4K 240Hz QD-OLED 配上 DP 2.1a UHBR20 的零壓縮輸出，創作者跟玩家想要極致畫面時就是它。三星 Odyssey OLED G8 走高階娛樂路線，32 吋 4K 240Hz QD-OLED 還內建智慧聯網。專業修圖調色的就看 ASUS ProArt PA279CRV，原廠校色 Delta E 小於 2，99% DCI-P3 加 99% Adobe RGB，價格還壓在同級最低。講純性價比，技嘉 M28U 還是那台開創 4K 平價路線的代表作，28 吋 144Hz IPS 配 HDMI 2.1，台幣一萬五出頭就有。用 Mac 的人就在 Apple Studio Display 跟 LG UltraFine 5K 之間挑，前者 5K 218 PPI 配 Thunderbolt 整合最順手。預算有限就 Acer KB272，27 吋 1080p IPS 100Hz，台幣四千有找，入門最乾淨的選擇。

highlights.title: U2724DE 強在一條線取代你整個擴充底座
highlights.body: 我一直把 U2724DE 排第一，是因為它解掉了現代桌面真正的痛點，線材一團亂加上缺一個 dock。Thunderbolt 4 一條線同時傳 1440p 120Hz 畫面、供 90W 幫筆電充電，還帶一個網路孔跟一排 USB，全部靠這一條搞定。IPS Black 面板做到 2,000:1 對比，以 LCD 來說黑階真的夠深。對每天插拔筆電在家跟公司兩邊跑的人來說，今年沒有比它更省事的選擇。

highlights.title: 高階畫質這局 OLED 全拿，PG27UCDM 就是證明
highlights.body: 在市場頂端，QD-OLED 跟 LCD 的畫質差距現在已經拉開了。PG27UCDM 是 27 吋 4K 面板跑 240Hz，每個像素獨立控光，反應時間 0.03ms，而且 DP 2.1a UHBR20 那個埠能把 4K 240Hz 訊號完全零壓縮送出去。再加上 tandem 面板設計拉長了抗烙印壽命，還有人離開就自動黑屏的距離感測器，這就是我會推給任何追求最佳畫面的創作者跟玩家的那一台。

highlights.title: 技嘉 M28U 到現在還是 4K 性價比的標竿
highlights.body: 上市這麼多年，要我推薦預算取向的 4K 螢幕，M28U 還是首選。28 吋 SS IPS 面板跑 144Hz 配 HDMI 2.1，色準 Delta E 小於 1，還內建 KVM，台幣一萬五出頭，這個每塊錢買到的規格還是電爆更貴的對手。它在真 HDR 跟 OLED 對比上有取捨，這點我老實講，但要一塊銳利又快的 4K 面板兼顧工作跟遊戲，性價比就是沒人打得贏。

highlights.title: 這個價位談調色，ProArt PA279CRV 沒有對手
highlights.body: ProArt PA279CRV 給的正是攝影師跟剪片的人真正要的東西，原廠校色 Delta E 小於 2，99% DCI-P3 加 99% Adobe RGB 覆蓋，還有硬體校色流程能讓畫面在長時間工作下維持一致。USB-C 串接讓多螢幕桌面保持乾淨。台幣一萬三出頭就壓過所有同級創作者螢幕的價格，這也是為什麼我把它擺在調色首選，連貴一倍的機種都比不過。

highlights.title: 27 吋配 1440p 是 2026 年解析度的甜蜜點
highlights.body: 資料一直指向同一個結論，27 吋 1440p 面板大概是 109 PPI，文字跟介面夠銳利，不用開縮放就很清楚，而且中階顯卡就能輕鬆推高幀數。所以我心目中的最佳全能機是 1440p 而不是 4K。4K 在創作者跟對細節龜毛的人身上有它的價值，但 1440p 還是大多數人最該買的解析度。

en.commentary: The Dell UltraSharp U2724DE is still the monitor I recommend to almost everyone, and nothing this week changed that. Its IPS Black panel reaches a 2,000:1 contrast ratio while a single Thunderbolt 4 cable runs video, 90W charging and a full port hub, which turns one screen into your entire docking station. That is exactly what a hybrid desk needs. The interesting news this month sits one tier up, Dell's CES launches keep maturing into shipping products, including the UltraSharp 32 4K QD-OLED, the world's first DisplayHDR True Black 500 QD-OLED with anti glare low reflectance, factory tuned to Delta E under 1 with Thunderbolt 4 up to 140W, now available globally around 2,600 dollars. It is a stunning creator panel, though at that price it serves a narrower audience than the boards in my top five, so the value order holds. For people who want every pixel sharp, the U2725QE pushes the docking idea to 4K at 120Hz with a world first 3,000:1 contrast IPS Black panel, and at roughly 700 dollars it is the smartest 4K work display of the year. The ASUS ROG Swift PG27UCDM earns the image quality crown with its 4K 240Hz QD-OLED panel and DisplayPort 2.1a UHBR20 carrying uncompressed 4K, the screen creators and gamers reach for when only the best will do. Samsung's Odyssey OLED G8 takes the premium entertainment lane with a 32 inch 4K 240Hz QD-OLED and a built in smart hub. Color pros get the ASUS ProArt PA279CRV, factory calibrated to Delta E under 2 with 99 percent DCI-P3 and 99 percent Adobe RGB at a price that undercuts rivals. For raw value the Gigabyte M28U remains the 4K bargain, a 28 inch 144Hz IPS panel with HDMI 2.1 near 450 dollars. Mac owners split between the Apple Studio Display and the LG UltraFine 5K, and when budget rules the Acer KB272 delivers a 27 inch 1080p IPS panel at 100Hz for around 130 dollars.

highlights.title: The Dell U2724DE is the best all rounder for a hybrid desk
highlights.body: A 2,000:1 contrast IPS Black panel pairs with a single Thunderbolt 4 cable that carries video, 90W charging and a full port hub. That one cable turns the monitor into your whole docking station, which is precisely what a laptop plus desktop setup needs, and it is why this stays my default recommendation.

highlights.title: Dell's new 32 inch 4K QD-OLED is gorgeous but a narrower buy
highlights.body: The UltraSharp 32 4K QD-OLED is the world's first DisplayHDR True Black 500 QD-OLED with anti glare low reflectance, factory tuned to Delta E under 1 with 140W Thunderbolt 4. At around 2,600 dollars it is a dream creator panel, though that price keeps it below the broad value picks in my top five.

highlights.title: The U2725QE is the smartest 4K work display of the year
highlights.body: It brings the same single cable docking idea to 4K at 120Hz with a world first 3,000:1 contrast IPS Black panel. Near 700 dollars for that combination of sharpness, contrast and connectivity makes it the productivity 4K I steer most desk workers toward.

highlights.title: The ROG Swift PG27UCDM owns the image quality crown
highlights.body: Its 4K 240Hz QD-OLED panel and DisplayPort 2.1a UHBR20 carry uncompressed 4K without compression artifacts, the detail and motion clarity creators and gamers chase. When only the best picture will do and budget is secondary, this is the screen.

zh-tw.commentary: Dell UltraSharp U2724DE 還是我幾乎會推給每個人的螢幕，這週沒有任何事改變這點。它的 IPS Black 面板做到 2000:1 對比，一條 Thunderbolt 4 線同時走影像、90W 充電跟完整 USB Hub，一台螢幕直接變成你整套擴充座。這正是混合辦公桌需要的。這個月有意思的消息在上一階，Dell 在 CES 發表的東西陸續變成正式出貨產品，包含 UltraSharp 32 4K QD-OLED，全球首款 DisplayHDR True Black 500 的 QD-OLED 還帶抗眩低反射，出廠校到 Delta E 低於 1，Thunderbolt 4 最高 140W，現在全球開賣，約 2600 美金。這是張很驚豔的創作者面板，但這價位服務的客群比我前五名窄，所以 CP 值排序不動。要每個像素都銳利的人，U2725QE 把擴充座概念推到 4K 120Hz，全球首款 3000:1 對比的 IPS Black 面板，約 700 美金，是今年最聰明的 4K 工作螢幕。ASUS ROG Swift PG27UCDM 拿下畫質王冠，4K 240Hz QD-OLED 加 DisplayPort 2.1a UHBR20 傳無壓縮 4K，創作者跟玩家只要最好就會選它。三星 Odyssey OLED G8 走高階娛樂線，32 吋 4K 240Hz QD-OLED 加內建智慧 Hub。色彩專業選 ASUS ProArt PA279CRV，出廠校到 Delta E 低於 2，99 趴 DCI-P3 跟 99 趴 Adobe RGB，價格還壓過對手。純看 CP 值，技嘉 M28U 還是 4K 性價標竿，28 吋 144Hz IPS 加 HDMI 2.1，約 450 美金。Mac 用戶在 Apple Studio Display 跟 LG UltraFine 5K 之間二選一，預算掛帥的話 Acer KB272 給你 27 吋 1080p IPS 100Hz，約 130 美金。

highlights.title: Dell U2724DE 是混合辦公桌最強全能機
highlights.body: 2000:1 對比的 IPS Black 面板搭一條 Thunderbolt 4 線，影像、90W 充電、完整 USB Hub 全包。這一條線就把螢幕變成整套擴充座，正是筆電加桌機環境最需要的，這也是它穩坐我預設推薦的原因。

highlights.title: Dell 新的 32 吋 4K QD-OLED 很美，但客群比較窄
highlights.body: UltraSharp 32 4K QD-OLED 是全球首款帶抗眩低反射的 DisplayHDR True Black 500 QD-OLED，出廠校到 Delta E 低於 1，140W Thunderbolt 4。約 2600 美金是創作者夢幻面板，但這價位讓它排在我前五名那些大眾 CP 值選擇之下。

highlights.title: U2725QE 是今年最聰明的 4K 工作螢幕
highlights.body: 它把一條線擴充座的概念帶到 4K 120Hz，全球首款 3000:1 對比的 IPS Black 面板。約 700 美金就有這種銳利度、對比跟連接性，是我最常推給辦公族的生產力 4K。

highlights.title: ROG Swift PG27UCDM 拿下畫質王冠
highlights.body: 4K 240Hz QD-OLED 面板加 DisplayPort 2.1a UHBR20 傳無壓縮 4K，沒有壓縮雜訊，那種細節跟動態清晰度正是創作者跟玩家在追的。只要最好的畫面、預算其次，就選這張。

references.title: The 5 Best Dell Monitors of 2026
Dell UltraSharp U3226Q 4K 32-inch QD-OLED monitor review
The Best OLED Gaming Monitors to Buy in 2026

en.commentary: The Dell U2724DE keeps my top spot, and after living with it I keep coming back to the same conclusion: for the way most people actually work, this is the best monitor you can buy. The IPS Black panel gives you deep contrast, the ergonomic stand and rich connectivity including a built-in KVM and USB-C hub make a cluttered desk disappear, and the price stays reasonable for what you get. Its sibling, the Dell U2725QE, holds second by adding a sharper 4K panel for people who want more pixel density without giving up that same brilliant productivity feature set. The Asus ROG Swift PG27UCDM stays third as the image-quality standout, that QD-OLED panel is genuinely stunning for gaming and HDR content. Samsung's Odyssey OLED G8 follows in fourth on the strength of its gorgeous panel. This week the notable launch chatter is around Dell's new 2026 UltraSharp QD-OLED models like the U3226Q, a reference-grade 32-inch 4K panel with a built-in colorimeter aimed at color-critical pros. It is exciting, but at around $2,600 it serves a narrow audience, and it has not displaced my mainstream picks. So I am keeping the order steady. My advice: most people should buy the U2724DE and enjoy the KVM and clean desk. Want 4K sharpness, step up to the U2725QE. Gamers and HDR fans should go for the PG27UCDM.

highlights.title: Dell U2724DE is the best for real work
highlights.body: The IPS Black panel, ergonomic stand, and built-in KVM plus USB-C hub make it the productivity monitor I recommend to most people.

highlights.title: U2725QE adds 4K sharpness
highlights.body: It keeps the same brilliant feature set while stepping up to a crisper 4K panel for those who want more pixel density.

highlights.title: ROG Swift PG27UCDM dazzles for gaming
highlights.body: The QD-OLED panel is genuinely stunning for games and HDR content, my pick when image quality comes first.

highlights.title: Dell's U3226Q targets color pros
highlights.body: The new reference-grade 32-inch 4K QD-OLED with a built-in colorimeter is impressive, though its $2,600 price serves a narrow pro audience.

zh-tw.commentary: Dell U2724DE 守住我心中第一名，實際用了一陣子，我還是回到同一個結論：以多數人真正的工作方式來看，這就是你能買到最好的螢幕。IPS Black 面板給你很深的對比，符合人體工學的腳架加上豐富的連接埠，內建 KVM 跟 USB-C 集線器，桌面瞬間清爽。以這個內容來說，價格也很合理。它的兄弟款 Dell U2725QE 排第二，多了更銳利的 4K 面板，給想要更高像素密度、又不想放棄這套出色生產力功能的人。Asus ROG Swift PG27UCDM 守住第三，是畫質標竿，那塊 QD-OLED 面板拿來打電動跟看 HDR 內容真的驚豔。Samsung Odyssey OLED G8 排第四，靠的是它那塊漂亮面板。這週比較受矚目的新品話題，是 Dell 2026 新款 UltraSharp QD-OLED，像 U3226Q，一塊參考級 32 吋 4K 面板，內建校色儀，主打對色彩要求極高的專業人士。很令人興奮，但定價約台幣八萬，服務的客群很窄，也還沒撼動我的主流推薦。所以排名維持不動。建議：多數人買 U2724DE，享受 KVM 跟清爽桌面就好。想要 4K 銳利度，升級到 U2725QE。玩家跟 HDR 愛好者就挑 PG27UCDM。

highlights.title: Dell U2724DE 最適合真正工作
highlights.body: IPS Black 面板、人體工學腳架，加上內建 KVM 與 USB-C 集線器，是我推薦給多數人的生產力螢幕。

highlights.title: U2725QE 加上 4K 銳利度
highlights.body: 保留同樣出色的功能，升級到更清晰的 4K 面板，給想要更高像素密度的人。

highlights.title: ROG Swift PG27UCDM 打電動超驚豔
highlights.body: QD-OLED 面板拿來玩遊戲與看 HDR 內容真的漂亮，是畫質優先時的首選。

highlights.title: Dell U3226Q 主打色彩專業
highlights.body: 新款參考級 32 吋 4K QD-OLED 內建校色儀很厲害，但約台幣八萬的定價只服務小眾專業族群。

references.title: Dell UltraSharp U3226Q 4K 32-inch QD-OLED monitor review: Pro-grade with reference-level color
The 6 Best OLED Monitors of 2026
Dell's 2026 monitors: 4K QD-OLED for professionals and first 52-inch 6K LCD

en.commentary: The monitor scene is busy with new OLED arrivals, but my everyday picks hold firm because the best all rounders still come from Dell's UltraSharp line. The U2724DE keeps my top spot as the productivity workhorse most people should buy. Its 120Hz IPS panel feels smooth for daily work, the built in KVM and full port array clean up a two machine desk, and the ergonomic stand makes long sessions easy on the neck. For a single monitor that handles spreadsheets, code, and a bit of evening gaming, it is the safe answer. The U2725QE sits second for anyone who wants the sharper 4K resolution and tighter text, and it shares the same excellent connectivity. The Asus ROG Swift PG27UCDM holds third as the image quality champion, with a QD-OLED panel that delivers reference level color and stunning contrast for creators and gamers who put the picture first. This month brought a wave of new releases, including Dell's pro grade U3226Q QD-OLED with a built in colorimeter and fresh Asus 4K 240Hz W-OLED panels, so the high end keeps getting deeper. I held the ranks because those premium arrivals serve niches rather than unseating my mainstream picks. Buy the U2724DE for the best all around productivity, step up to the U2725QE for 4K sharpness, and choose the PG27UCDM if image quality is your single biggest priority.

highlights.title: Dell U2724DE stays the workhorse
highlights.body: A smooth 120Hz panel, built in KVM, and a great stand keep it first for everyday productivity on a two machine desk.

highlights.title: U2725QE for 4K sharpness
highlights.body: It holds second for anyone who wants tighter text and crisp 4K while sharing the same excellent connectivity.

highlights.title: PG27UCDM owns image quality
highlights.body: Its QD-OLED panel delivers reference level color and stunning contrast, holding third for creators and gamers.

highlights.title: New OLED arrivals deepen the high end
highlights.body: Dell's colorimeter equipped U3226Q and fresh Asus 4K 240Hz W-OLED panels expand the premium tier this month.

zh-tw.commentary: 螢幕市場這陣子新 OLED 一波接一波，但我的日常選擇穩如泰山，因為最好的全能機種還是出自 Dell 的 UltraSharp 系列。U2724DE 守住我的第一名，是多數人該買的生產力主力機。120Hz IPS 面板日常用起來很順，內建 KVM 加上完整連接埠把雙主機桌面整理得乾乾淨淨，人體工學支架讓長時間使用脖子也輕鬆。想要一台同時搞定試算表、寫程式、再加一點晚間遊戲的螢幕，它就是穩妥的答案。U2725QE 排第二，給想要更銳利 4K 解析度、文字更細緻的人，連接性一樣出色。Asus ROG Swift PG27UCDM 守住第三，是畫質之王，QD-OLED 面板帶來參考級色彩跟驚人對比，給把畫面擺第一的創作者跟玩家。這個月來了一波新品，包括 Dell 專業級、內建校色儀的 U3226Q QD-OLED，還有 Asus 全新 4K 240Hz W-OLED 面板，高階這端越來越豐富。這週我沒動排名，因為那些高階新品服務的是特定族群，還撼動不了我的主流推薦。要最佳全能生產力買 U2724DE，想要 4K 銳利度往上選 U2725QE，畫質是你唯一最在乎的事就挑 PG27UCDM。

highlights.title: Dell U2724DE 維持主力機
highlights.body: 順暢 120Hz 面板、內建 KVM 與優秀支架，讓它在雙主機桌面的日常生產力穩居第一。

highlights.title: U2725QE 主打 4K 銳利
highlights.body: 想要更細緻文字與清晰 4K 的人讓它排第二，連接性同樣出色。

highlights.title: PG27UCDM 稱霸畫質
highlights.body: QD-OLED 面板帶來參考級色彩與驚人對比，給創作者與玩家守住第三。

highlights.title: 新 OLED 充實高階
highlights.body: Dell 內建校色儀的 U3226Q 與 Asus 全新 4K 240Hz W-OLED 面板，本月擴大了高階陣容。

en.commentary: The Dell U2724DE stays my top all-rounder this week, and the reason is the docking. A single USB-C cable charges your laptop, drives the panel, and lights up its 2.5G Ethernet and downstream ports, which turns a desk into a one-cable workstation. The 120Hz IPS panel is sharp and color-solid for everything short of pro photo work, and at its price the value is hard to beat. The U2725QE holds second for anyone who wants the same dock in 4K. On the gaming side, the ASUS ROG Swift PG27UCDM stays third as the QD-OLED to buy, pairing 4K with 240Hz for the cleanest motion I have tested at this size. ASUS shipped the PG32UCWM and XG32UQWMS 4K 240Hz W-OLED panels in early June, and Samsung is showing a 32-inch triple-mode QD-OLED that switches between 4K 360Hz and 1080p 680Hz, both worth watching, but neither is broadly available yet so I held all ten ranks steady this week. The clear trend is OLED maturing fast at 27 and 32 inches while prices ease. If you work all day, buy the Dell dock monitors. If you game, the ASUS and Samsung Odyssey OLED panels deliver the motion clarity and contrast that an IPS simply cannot match. For color work, the ProArt and BenQ stay the calibrated picks.

highlights.title: Dell U2724DE wins on docking
highlights.body: One USB-C cable charges the laptop, drives the panel, and powers 2.5G Ethernet plus downstream ports. That one-cable desk is why it stays my top all-rounder.

highlights.title: PG27UCDM is the QD-OLED to buy
highlights.body: 4K paired with 240Hz delivers the cleanest motion I have tested at 27 inches, holding third as the gaming pick over another stable week.

highlights.title: New 32-inch OLEDs on the horizon
highlights.body: ASUS shipped PG32UCWM W-OLED panels in early June and Samsung is showing a triple-mode QD-OLED, both worth watching once broadly available.

highlights.title: ProArt and BenQ stay the color picks
highlights.body: For calibrated photo and video work the ASUS ProArt and BenQ PD2725U remain the accurate choices, factory-tuned and ready out of the box.

zh-tw.commentary: Dell U2724DE 這週繼續是我心中最全能的一台，原因就在擴充塢功能。一條 USB-C 線就幫筆電充電、驅動螢幕，還點亮它的 2.5G 乙太網路跟下游連接埠，把桌面變成一條線就搞定的工作站。120Hz 的 IPS 面板很銳利，色彩也夠扎實，除了專業修圖以外什麼都應付得來，以這個價格 CP 值真的很難打敗。U2725QE 守住第二，想要同樣擴充塢但要 4K 的人就選它。遊戲這邊，ASUS ROG Swift PG27UCDM 守住第三，是現在該買的 QD-OLED，4K 配 240Hz 給你我在這個尺寸測過最乾淨的動態表現。ASUS 六月初出了 PG32UCWM 跟 XG32UQWMS 這兩台 4K 240Hz 的 W-OLED，Samsung 也在展示一台 32 吋三模 QD-OLED，能在 4K 360Hz 跟 1080p 680Hz 之間切換，兩個都值得關注，但都還沒大規模上市，所以這週十個名次我全部不動。趨勢很明確，OLED 在 27 跟 32 吋快速成熟，價格也在鬆動。你整天工作就買 Dell 的擴充塢螢幕。你打遊戲，ASUS 跟 Samsung Odyssey OLED 給你的動態清晰度跟對比，IPS 就是比不上。修圖調色，ProArt 跟 BenQ 還是校色首選。

highlights.title: Dell U2724DE 擴充塢取勝
highlights.body: 一條 USB-C 線幫筆電充電、驅動螢幕，還供電給 2.5G 乙太網路跟下游埠。一條線搞定桌面，這就是它穩居最全能的原因。

highlights.title: PG27UCDM 是該買的 QD-OLED
highlights.body: 4K 配 240Hz 給你我在 27 吋測過最乾淨的動態表現，又一個穩定的一週守住第三遊戲首選。

highlights.title: 32 吋新 OLED 即將登場
highlights.body: ASUS 六月初出了 PG32UCWM W-OLED，Samsung 也在展示三模 QD-OLED，兩個都值得等大規模上市後關注。

highlights.title: ProArt 跟 BenQ 仍是校色首選
highlights.body: 專業修圖調色，ASUS ProArt 跟 BenQ PD2725U 依然是準確的選擇，出廠就校好色，開箱即用。

references.title: Best monitors of Computex 2026: top new displays you need to know about
The 6 Best Monitors of 2026
New Monitors In 2026: What To Expect

en.commentary: I keep coming back to the same conclusion this week, the Dell U2724DE is still the monitor I recommend to the most people. The 120Hz IPS panel, the USB-C dock with 90W passthrough, and the slim bezels make it the easiest single-cable desk upgrade I know of, and after living with one for months I trust the ergonomics completely. For pure image quality though, the ASUS ROG Swift PG27UCDM has earned a small bump from me. Reviewers at RTINGS now call its 27-inch 4K QD-OLED panel the best they have tested, and the fresh wave of Computex coverage backs that up. The contrast and motion clarity are genuinely in another tier, so I nudged its score up a notch. The Dell U2725QE remains my pick for anyone who wants 4K sharpness on a productivity panel, the extra pixels pay off the moment you open a spreadsheet or a timeline. Computex 2026 brought a flood of mini LED announcements from TCL, including the 27C2A Pro that shipped on June 5, and I expect those to reshape the value end of this list later in the year. For now I am holding the field steady because nothing I have measured changes the order. If you do color work, the ASUS ProArt PA279CRV still gives you factory calibration at a price that feels almost unfair. Buy for the panel type that matches your actual work, that is the advice that ages best.

highlights.title: Dell U2724DE stays my default
highlights.body: One USB-C cable powers the laptop, drives the display, and feeds the dock. For a clean office or home desk that simplicity beats any spec sheet, which is why it holds rank one again.

highlights.title: ASUS PG27UCDM earns a bump
highlights.body: RTINGS now calls its 4K QD-OLED the best panel they have tested. The contrast and motion clarity justify the small score increase I gave it this week.

highlights.title: Mini LED wave is building
highlights.body: Computex 2026 and TCL's June 5 launch of the 27C2A Pro signal strong value competition ahead. I am watching this segment closely for the next refresh.

highlights.title: Match the panel to the work
highlights.body: The ProArt PA279CRV for color, the U2725QE for 4K productivity, the gaming OLEDs for motion. Pick by task and you will be happy for years.

zh-tw.commentary: 這禮拜我又繞回同樣的結論，Dell U2724DE 還是我最常推薦給一般人的螢幕。120Hz 的 IPS 面板，加上帶 90W 供電的 USB-C 擴充座，還有窄邊框，老實說這就是我認知裡最省事的「一條線升級桌面」方案，用了好幾個月，那個人體工學支架我是真的信得過。不過講到純粹的畫質，ASUS ROG Swift PG27UCDM 這次我幫它加了一點分。RTINGS 現在直接說它那塊 27 吋 4K QD-OLED 是他們測過最好的面板，剛出爐的 Computex 報導也都這樣講。對比跟動態清晰度真的是另一個層次，所以我把它往上挪了一點。想要 4K 銳利度又要兼顧生產力的人，Dell U2725QE 還是我的首選，多出來的解析度一打開試算表或時間軸就有感。Computex 2026 上 TCL 丟出一大票 mini LED，包含 6 月 5 號就開賣的 27C2A Pro，我猜這些下半年會把整個 CP 值戰場洗一次牌。眼前我先讓榜單穩住，因為我量到的數據都不足以改順序。要做色彩工作的話，ASUS ProArt PA279CRV 出廠校色給的價格幾乎佛心。挑跟你實際工作對得上的面板類型，這個建議放久了也不會錯。

highlights.title: Dell U2724DE 繼續坐穩第一
highlights.body: 一條 USB-C 同時餵筆電、驅動螢幕、串起擴充座。對想要乾淨桌面的人，這種省事程度勝過任何規格表，所以它這次還是第一。

highlights.title: ASUS PG27UCDM 加一點分
highlights.body: RTINGS 現在說它那塊 4K QD-OLED 是測過最好的面板。對比跟動態清晰度撐得起這次我給的小幅加分。

highlights.title: mini LED 大軍正在集結
highlights.body: Computex 2026 加上 TCL 6 月 5 號開賣的 27C2A Pro，都在預告 CP 值戰場要熱起來。我會緊盯這一塊等下次改版。

highlights.title: 面板類型對上你的工作
highlights.body: 做色彩選 ProArt PA279CRV，要 4K 生產力挑 U2725QE，重動態就看電競 OLED。照用途挑，爽好幾年。

references.title: Dell Announce the UltraSharp U3226Q, a 32" 4K QD-OLED Monitor Aimed at Creative Professionals
OLED Monitors In 2026: Current Market Status
Dell Unveils New UltraSharp Monitors with World-First Innovations

en.commentary: Dell U2724DE stays my top pick for the office and the hybrid desk. The 120Hz IPS panel, full Thunderbolt docking, and the cleanest ergonomics in the category still make it the monitor I recommend to most people who work all day at a desk. One cable for power, data, and display keeps a setup tidy in a way few rivals match. The U2725QE holds second as the 4K step-up for anyone who wants more pixels for text and detail work without giving up that same docking and stand. The two Dells are close, so the choice really comes down to whether you need 4K sharpness or prefer the value of the 1440p sibling. Asus ROG Swift PG27UCDM keeps third and remains my image-quality champion. That 4K QD-OLED panel is reference-grade for gaming and HDR, and nothing here matches its contrast. Worth noting for creators, Dell's incoming UltraSharp U3226Q QD-OLED signals where premium professional panels are heading, with Dolby Vision and 99% DCI-P3, so the OLED productivity gap is closing fast. Samsung Odyssey OLED G8 and Asus ProArt PA279CRV round out the upper middle, the first for gamers and the second for color-accurate creative work at a fair price. The order is unchanged this week. The big news was announcements rather than units you can buy and rank today, so I held the board steady.

highlights.title: Dell U2724DE is the all-day desk pick
highlights.body: 120Hz IPS, full Thunderbolt docking, and the best ergonomics here make it my default office recommendation. One cable handles power, data, and display for a tidy setup.

highlights.title: U2725QE for sharper text
highlights.body: The 4K sibling keeps the same docking and stand while adding pixel density for detail work. Choose it when text clarity matters more than the 1440p value.

highlights.title: ROG Swift PG27UCDM leads on image
highlights.body: The 4K QD-OLED panel is reference-grade for gaming and HDR, scoring 9.9 on image quality. Nothing else on the list matches its contrast.

highlights.title: OLED productivity gap is narrowing
highlights.body: Dell's incoming UltraSharp U3226Q QD-OLED brings Dolby Vision and 99% DCI-P3 to professionals. Premium OLED productivity panels are arriving fast, so creators have more to look forward to.

zh-tw.commentary: Dell U2724DE 這週繼續坐辦公與混合辦公桌的第一。120Hz IPS 面板、完整 Thunderbolt 擴充塢、加上這個級距裡最乾淨的人體工學，整天坐在桌前工作的人，我大多還是推它。一條線搞定供電、資料跟畫面，桌面整潔度很少有對手追得上。U2725QE 守住第二，給想要更多像素來處理文字跟細節、又不想放棄同樣擴充塢跟腳架的人。這兩台 Dell 很接近，選哪台就看你需要 4K 的銳利度，還是偏好 1440p 兄弟款的 CP 值。Asus ROG Swift PG27UCDM 維持第三，依舊是我的畫質王者。那塊 4K QD-OLED 面板用在遊戲跟 HDR 上就是參考級，對比度榜上沒人比得過。對創作者要提一句，Dell 即將推出的 UltraSharp U3226Q QD-OLED 透露了高階專業面板的走向，帶 Dolby Vision 跟 99% DCI-P3，OLED 在生產力這塊的差距正在快速縮小。Samsung Odyssey OLED G8 跟 Asus ProArt PA279CRV 撐起中上段，前者給玩家，後者給要色準又要合理價格的創意工作。這週排名沒動，因為大新聞都是發表會消息，目前都還停在發表階段，要實際買來排榜還得再等等，所以我先讓榜單維持原樣。

highlights.title: Dell U2724DE 是整天桌前的首選
highlights.body: 120Hz IPS、完整 Thunderbolt 擴充塢、加上全場最好的人體工學，是我預設的辦公推薦。一條線搞定供電、資料跟畫面，桌面超整潔。

highlights.title: 要更銳利的文字就選 U2725QE
highlights.body: 4K 兄弟款保留一樣的擴充塢跟腳架，再加上處理細節用的像素密度。文字清晰度比 1440p 的 CP 值更重要時，就挑它。

highlights.title: ROG Swift PG27UCDM 畫質領先
highlights.body: 4K QD-OLED 面板用在遊戲跟 HDR 就是參考級，畫質拿到 9.9 分。清單上沒有誰的對比度比得過它。

highlights.title: OLED 生產力差距正在縮小
highlights.body: Dell 即將推出的 UltraSharp U3226Q QD-OLED 把 Dolby Vision 跟 99% DCI-P3 帶給專業用戶。高階 OLED 生產力面板來得很快，創作者有更多可以期待。

references.title: Dell U2725QE Monitor Review
Dell U2725QE Review - Brilliant 4K 120Hz Thunderbolt Hub Monitor
Dell UltraSharp 27 4K Thunderbolt Hub Monitor (U2725QE) review

en.commentary: The Dell U2724DE holds my top spot as the best all-around monitor for most people, and nothing this week changed that. Its 1440p IPS Black panel, full Thunderbolt 4 hub, 120Hz refresh and superb ergonomics make it the most complete productivity display you can buy without overspending. For a home office or a hybrid work setup, this is still the first monitor I recommend. The bigger story this week is fresh deep-dive coverage of the Dell U2725QE, the 4K sibling that sits at number two. RTINGS and others confirm it is Dell's first enhanced IPS Black panel, hitting a measured 2933:1 contrast at 58% brightness, which is exceptional for IPS and delivers genuinely deep blacks. It covers 100% sRGB, 95% Adobe RGB and 92% DCI-P3 with an out-of-box dE average of 0.93, so it is accurate before you even touch calibration. Add Thunderbolt 4, 120Hz and a 5-star TUV EyeComfort rating and it is the 4K productivity monitor to beat. The ASUS ROG Swift PG27UCDM stays third as my pick for anyone who wants the best image quality on the list, with a stunning 4K OLED panel that is unmatched for contrast and motion. The Dell U3226Q remains the choice for those who want a larger 4K canvas with reference color, and the Samsung Odyssey OLED G8 keeps fifth for gamers who want OLED without the productivity focus. Further down, the ASUS ProArt PA279CRV and Gigabyte M28U continue to anchor the value end with strong color and price. Rankings hold steady because the field is mature and the new coverage reinforced existing positions rather than upending them.

highlights.title: Dell U2724DE stays the best all-rounder
highlights.body: 1440p IPS Black, a full Thunderbolt 4 hub, 120Hz and excellent ergonomics make it the most complete productivity display at its price. It is my first pick for most home offices.

highlights.title: Dell U2725QE confirmed as a contrast standout
highlights.body: RTINGS measured 2933:1 contrast at 58% brightness, exceptional for IPS. Combined with 0.93 dE out-of-box accuracy, it is the 4K productivity monitor to beat at number two.

highlights.title: U2725QE accuracy is calibration-free
highlights.body: 100% sRGB, 95% Adobe RGB and 92% DCI-P3 with a 0.93 dE average means it is accurate straight out of the box. Add a 5-star TUV EyeComfort rating for all-day comfort.

highlights.title: ASUS PG27UCDM owns image quality
highlights.body: Its 4K OLED panel is the best-looking display on this list for contrast and motion. If picture quality is your priority over a USB-C hub, this is the one to get.

highlights.title: ProArt and Gigabyte hold the value end
highlights.body: The PA279CRV brings reference-grade color at a fair price, and the M28U remains a strong budget 4K pick. Both keep their spots as the smart-money options.

zh-tw.commentary: Dell U2724DE 還是穩坐我心中最適合多數人的全能螢幕第一名，這週也沒有任何事情改變這點。它的 1440p IPS Black 面板、完整的 Thunderbolt 4 集線功能、120Hz 更新率加上很棒的人體工學，讓它成為不用花大錢就能買到最完整的生產力螢幕。家裡的辦公空間或混合辦公的配置，我第一個還是推它。這週比較大的消息是 Dell U2725QE 的深度評測陸續出爐，這台 4K 兄弟機排在第二。RTINGS 跟其他媒體確認它是 Dell 第一款強化版 IPS Black 面板，在 58% 亮度時實測到 2933:1 的對比度，以 IPS 來說非常出色，黑色真的很深。它涵蓋 100% sRGB、95% Adobe RGB 跟 92% DCI-P3，出廠 dE 平均值 0.93，代表你還沒校色它就很準了。再加上 Thunderbolt 4、120Hz 跟 5 星 TUV 護眼認證，它就是 4K 生產力螢幕裡要被挑戰的對象。ASUS ROG Swift PG27UCDM 守第三，是我推薦給想要榜單裡最佳畫質的人，那塊 4K OLED 面板的對比跟動態表現無人能敵。Dell U3226Q 還是想要更大 4K 畫布又要參考級色彩的首選，Samsung Odyssey OLED G8 守第五，適合想要 OLED 又不需要生產力取向的玩家。再往下，ASUS ProArt PA279CRV 跟 Gigabyte M28U 繼續穩住高 CP 那端，色彩跟價格都很有競爭力。名次維持不動，因為這個市場很成熟，新出的評測是強化既有定位，而不是翻盤。

highlights.title: Dell U2724DE 還是最強全能機
highlights.body: 1440p IPS Black、完整 Thunderbolt 4 集線、120Hz 加上優秀人體工學，是這個價位最完整的生產力螢幕。多數居家辦公我第一個推它。

highlights.title: Dell U2725QE 確認是對比度黑馬
highlights.body: RTINGS 在 58% 亮度實測到 2933:1 對比，以 IPS 來說非常出色。再加上出廠 0.93 dE 的準度，它就是第二名這台要被挑戰的 4K 生產力螢幕。

highlights.title: U2725QE 不用校色就很準
highlights.body: 100% sRGB、95% Adobe RGB、92% DCI-P3，dE 平均 0.93，代表開箱就很準。再加上 5 星 TUV 護眼認證，長時間看也舒服。

highlights.title: ASUS PG27UCDM 畫質稱霸
highlights.body: 那塊 4K OLED 面板是榜單裡對比跟動態最好看的顯示器。如果你把畫質擺在 USB-C 集線之前，就選這台。

highlights.title: ProArt 跟 Gigabyte 穩住高 CP 端
highlights.body: PA279CRV 用合理價格帶來參考級色彩，M28U 還是很強的平價 4K 選擇。兩台都守住聰明買家的位置。

references.title: Prime Day gaming monitor deals live 2026
Best Prime Day monitor deals: Save big on OLED and more
Prime Day monitor deals are here

en.commentary: Prime Day landed on June 23 and it reshuffles the math more than any single hardware launch could. The Dell U2724DE holds the top spot because the discounts make an already excellent USB-C hub monitor genuinely cheap, and at its event price the value case is now airtight. That is why I nudged its value score up. The bigger story is the OLED tier. Samsung's Odyssey OLED G8 dropped to around 657 dollars in this sale, a 47 percent cut, and that turns a premium splurge into a reasonable buy. I bumped its value and moved it level with the ASUS ProArt in my overall confidence, because a 4K QD-OLED at that price beats almost anything for mixed work and play. The Dell U3226Q remains the best image on this list, but it stays expensive even on sale, so its value still drags it to fourth. At the bottom, the Acer KB272 is the clearest Prime Day steal at 89 dollars, a 27 inch IPS panel that no one should overpay for, so its value score is now near maximum. My advice this week is simple. If you have wanted an OLED, this is the window. If you just need a clean productivity screen, the Dell hub monitors are the smart money and the sale makes them painless to recommend.

highlights.title: Prime Day makes the Dell U2724DE an easy first pick
highlights.body: A single USB-C cable for power, video, and data is the feature most desk setups actually need, and the event pricing removes the only complaint people had. At its sale price the productivity-per-dollar is unmatched on this list, which is why it keeps the crown.

highlights.title: The OLED tier is the real winner of this sale
highlights.body: Samsung's Odyssey OLED G8 falling to roughly 657 dollars, a 47 percent cut, changes who should consider QD-OLED. A 4K 240Hz panel at that price handles color work and gaming equally well, so I lifted its value and overall standing.

highlights.title: The Acer KB272 is the budget steal of the week
highlights.body: At 89 dollars for a 27 inch IPS screen running up to 120Hz, this is the panel to grab for a second display or a starter setup. It will not impress on color, but no one should pay full price for a basic monitor when this exists.

highlights.title: Premium image still costs you on value
highlights.body: The Dell U3226Q stays the best looking screen here, yet even discounted it asks a lot. Image quality buyers will love it, but the value column keeps it in fourth, and that is the honest trade you accept for that panel.

zh-tw.commentary: Prime Day 從 6 月 23 日開跑，這檔特價對排名的影響其實比任何一台新機都大。Dell U2724DE 穩坐第一，原因很單純，這台本來就是很強的 USB-C 一線到底螢幕，特價後價格直接變漂亮，CP 值整個拉滿，所以我把它的價值分數往上調。這次最值得講的是 OLED 這一層。三星 Odyssey OLED G8 在這檔殺到大約 657 美金，等於砍了 47 趴，本來要咬牙才買得下去的旗艦，現在變成可以認真考慮的選擇。我把它的價值分數拉高，整體信心也跟 ASUS ProArt 拉平，因為這個價位的 4K QD-OLED，工作加打電動兩頭吃都很猛。Dell U3226Q 畫質還是榜上最頂，但就算特價也還是貴，價值分數把它壓在第四。榜尾的 Acer KB272 是這週最直接的撿便宜目標，89 美金的 27 吋 IPS，這種價錢沒人該買貴，所以價值分數我給到接近滿分。這週的建議很乾脆。想入手 OLED 的，現在就是時機。只是要一台乾淨的生產力螢幕，Dell 那兩台 hub 機就是聰明錢，特價讓我推得毫無壓力。

highlights.title: Prime Day 讓 Dell U2724DE 變成無腦首選
highlights.body: 一條 USB-C 搞定供電、畫面跟資料，這是多數桌面真正需要的功能。特價把唯一的抱怨點抹掉了，特價後每塊錢換到的生產力榜上無敵，第一名繼續坐穩。

highlights.title: OLED 這一層才是這檔特價真正的贏家
highlights.body: 三星 Odyssey OLED G8 殺到大約 657 美金，砍了 47 趴，直接改變誰該考慮 QD-OLED。這個價位的 4K 240Hz 面板，調色跟打電動都吃得下，價值跟整體名次我都往上拉。

highlights.title: Acer KB272 是這週最香的撿便宜貨
highlights.body: 89 美金買到 27 吋 IPS 還能跑到 120Hz，當第二螢幕或新手機組剛剛好。色彩別期待太多，但有它在,基本款螢幕真的沒理由買原價。

highlights.title: 頂規畫質還是要在價值上付代價
highlights.body: Dell U3226Q 還是榜上最好看的螢幕,可是就算特價開價還是不手軟。重畫質的人會愛它,但價值欄把它壓在第四,這就是換那塊面板要接受的老實交易。
